items.summary: Diagnose and fix the 'Payment service not ready. Please wait a moment and try again.' error shown when submitting the payment form. Audit the actor initialization flow in `useActor.ts` and the `useSubmitPayment` mutation in `useQueries.ts`: ensure the anonymous actor is fully initialized and non-null before the mutation is allowed to fire (gate the mutation on `!!actor`). If the actor is not yet ready at submission time, surface a user-friendly loading state (e.g., disable the submit button with a spinner) rather than immediately throwing an error. Add at least 2 automatic retries with exponential back-off in `useSubmitPayment` for transient initialization or network errors so that brief actor startup delays do not surface as immediate failures.
